full_text:
Wang Yu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Yu. Suggested consulting Cheng Yu on which lord to ally with: Yuan Shao or Gongsun Zan. Wang Yu was affiliated with Liu Dai.
